description: Read-only shadow opportunity universe for the v3.27.x shadow pipeline. Liquid US equity ETFs + mega-cap single names only. NO crypto, NO options, NO penny stocks, NO illiquid instruments.
v3_30_notes: v3.30 universe is read-only — used by shared/shadow_opportunity_generator.py + shared/market_data_provider.py.
Crypto / options / penny stocks remain forbidden until a separate audited PR introduces them with appropriate safety contracts.
Expansion beyond this list requires (a) liquidity check, (b) test coverage, (c) explicit docs update, (d) operator approval.
